description:
Turn your voice into polished text.

Ultra-fast AI powered dictation that understands what you want to say and how you want to say it. Instantly turn speech into perfect emails, crisp notes, clear messages, professional communication, and more.
New Features
- Run language models fully on-device with the new experimental Superwhisper S1-mini model — no cloud required
- New (experimental) Parakeet multi language real-time model for live transcription across more languages
- Automatic fallback to raw transcription if a language model fails, so you never lose a recording
- New "Supervocab" vocabulary engine for local whisper models
Improvements
- Faster microphone initialization between recordings
- Mode keyboard shortcut moved out of Advanced settings for easier access
- Improved model library table layout
- Smooth transitions between "AI Processed", "Original" and "Segmented" history item views
- Language picker search input
